description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine station_sws_shunt_term_chng_2, and is implemented by a call to station_sws_shunt_term_chng_2. Use this API to change a substation switched shunt node terminal connection in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = station_sws_shunt_term_chng(bus, intgar)

error_codes.description: bus does not belong to a substation.
error when moving switched shunt terminal connection.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
